signals.headline: RLUSD Stablecoin Full Rollout Confirmed** | YES | MED
signals.raw:
RLUSD Stablecoin Full Rollout Confirmed** | YES | MED  
Ripple USD (RLUSD) officially launched across XRP Ledger and Ethereum, driving record XRPL transaction volume and institutional adoption after SEC case resolution, fueling recent $1.51 price high on April 17.[1]

signals.headline: XRP Price Tests Key Pattern Apex (21 April 2026)** | YES | HIGH
signals.raw:
XRP Price Tests Key Pattern Apex (21 April 2026)** | YES | HIGH  
Symmetrical triangle on XRP charts reaches climax today with bearish MACD signal, signaling imminent directional breakout amid 6.7% weekly gains from ETF inflows ($38.86M over 4 days), Japan Rakuten listing, and XRPL zero-knowledge tech integration—strong catalysts for prediction market shifts.[3]

signals.headline: Cavaliers Secure 2-0 Series Lead Over Raptors in Game 2 with 115-105 Win** | YES | HIGH[1][2][3][5][6]
signals.raw:
Cavaliers Secure 2-0 Series Lead Over Raptors in Game 2 with 115-105 Win** | YES | HIGH[1][2][3][5][6]

The Cleveland Cavaliers defeated the Toronto Raptors 115-105 on Monday night (April 20, 2026) at Rocket Mortgage Arena, taking a commanding 2-0 lead in their Eastern Conference first-round playoff series, led by Donovan Mitchell's 30 points (9 in the fourth quarter) and James Harden's 28 points.

signals.headline: SEC Roundtable on CLARITY Act (16 April)** | NO | MED
signals.raw:
SEC Roundtable on CLARITY Act (16 April)** | NO | MED  
Scheduled April 16 discussion on CLARITY Act for digital asset oversight (SEC vs. CFTC) avoided negative XRP signals, supporting long-term bullish clarity post-March commodity classification, but no new confirmations today.[3]
